message.content: ["KA 2.0 established that AI failures occur when constructibility margins collapse on functional subspaces of the hidden state.", "A central assumption was that these subspaces are approximately fixed during inference or deployment.", "This paper relaxes that assumption: in adaptive systems, the failure subspaces themselves evolve."]
